architecture.summary: Pramana fine-tunes LLMs (Llama 3.2-3B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B) on Navya-Nyaya logic-structured problems to teach systematic epistemological reasoning. The system enforces a 6-phase reasoning pipeline (SAMSHAYA, PRAMANA, PANCHA AVAYAVA, TARKA, HETVABHASA, NIRNAYA) during both training and inference. Information flows from input problem → structured reasoning stages with format prompting and temperature control → reasoning output. The LLM learns to internalize the logical structure and epistemological methodology through supervised fine-tuning on 55 Nyaya-structured examples.

biblio.title: Pramana: Fine-Tuning Large Language Models for Epistemic Reasoning through Navya-Nyaya

claims.statement: Stage 1 achieves 100% semantic correctness on held-out evaluation despite only 40% strict format adherence
Models internalize reasoning content even when structural enforcement is imperfect
Ablation studies show format prompting and temperature critically affect performance, with optimal configurations differing by stage
Large language models produce fluent text but struggle with systematic reasoning, often hallucinating confident but unfounded claims
When Apple researchers added irrelevant context to mathematical problems, LLM performance degraded by 65%
